meaning: vbl.考虑,顾及,认为 prep.鉴于,考虑到,顾及
examples: We're considering buying a new car.
This idea is well worth considering.
The recording sounds very crisp, considering its age.
Bank of America said Wednesday it is still considering options for its money market funds group.
And to think, some people criticized Wal-Mart Stores for considering a policy of hiring healthy people.
